questions.text: Which sentence uses Present Simple correctly for a general truth? a) The sun rose in the east. b) The sun rises in the east. c) The sun has risen in the east.
Give an example of a sentence using Present Simple to describe a regular habit.
questions.correct_answer: I go for a run every morning.

answers: I go for a run every morning.

questions.text: Choose the correct Present Perfect sentence. a) She has visited Paris last year. b) They have lived here since 2010. c) He has finished his homework yesterday.
Write a sentence using 'already' in Present Perfect.
questions.correct_answer: I have already finished my homework.

answers: I have already finished my homework.

questions.text: Read the text below and answer the questions. Environmental issues are becoming increasingly urgent. Deforestation, caused by illegal logging and agricultural expansion, destroys habitats and reduces biodiversity. Many communities now adopt sustainable practices, such as using renewable energy sources like solar and wind power. Recycling programs help reduce waste, and governments are implementing policies to lower carbon footprints. However, pollution from plastics and industrial emissions remains a major challenge. It is crucial for individuals to take action, as collective efforts can lead to significant positive changes. What is the main topic of the passage? a) Benefits of renewable energy b) Environmental challenges and solutions c) Government policies on pollution
According to the passage, what is mentioned as a cause of deforestation? a) Climate change b) Illegal logging c) Recycling
What solution does the passage suggest for reducing pollution?
questions.correct_answer: Recycling programs and using renewable energy sources.

answers: Recycling programs and using renewable energy sources.
